Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a node group

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is changing node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is deleting node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create node group {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
